title: Epigram From The French[1]
content:
Who can believe with common sense,
    A bacon slice gives God offence;
    Or, how a herring has a charm
    Almighty vengeance to disarm?
    Wrapp'd up in majesty divine,
    Does he regard on what we dine?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jonathan Swift, titled "Epigram From The French[1]", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
